_note: Batch 4 of the AOD Linear restructure: seed the no-vibe-coding gate issues (decisions/specs/designs only; no code). 2 reconcile updates + 24 create-issue + dependency wiring. Milestones and projects from Batch 2 are referenced by UUID/name (projects map below). See docs/planning/batch-4-gate-issues.md. Run: node /Users/xavierperez/tools/linear-migration/migrate.mjs tools/linear/manifests/batch-4-gate-issues.json

operations.title: [Spec] App navigation / information architecture
operations.description:
## Goal
Define the app's navigation model and screen inventory: tab/stack structure, where each surface lives (dashboard, widget picker, settings/connections, kiosk entry, paywall, account), and the routes connecting them.

## Must cover
- expo-router structure (locked nav library)
- Screen inventory + entry points for connect-service, add-widget, create-dashboard, enter-kiosk, themes, account
- Deep-link handling for the OAuth callback

## Output
docs/specs/app-ia.md

operations.title: [Design] Brand visual identity (wordmark, palette, voice)
operations.description:
## Goal
Produce the brand visual identity once the name (AOD-1) is chosen: wordmark/logo, color palette seed, and voice/tone.

## Produce (Figma)
Wordmark, app icon direction, primary/accent palette, light + dark seeds.

## Handoff
Feeds DS-3 (tokens) and LAU-3 (store assets).

operations.title: [Design] Design tokens (color, type, spacing, dark theme)
operations.description:
## Goal
Define the token system the whole app themes from: color, type ramp, spacing, radii, elevation, and the dark + day/night-dim variants (AOD-11).

## Produce (Figma)
Token set exportable to code; light / dark / dimmed themes.

## Depends
Brand identity (DS-2) and the UI-foundation decision (AOD-16) for how tokens map to the chosen component base.

operations.title: [Design] Component library (cards, inputs, overlays, skeletons)
operations.description:
## Goal
Design the reusable component set: cards, buttons, inputs, toggles, drawers/sheets, skeletons, badges, and lock overlays, themed from DS-3.

## Produce (Figma)
Component variants + states for each primitive.

## Handoff
The foundation every per-feature design (PS-5/6/7/8, INT, BIL, KIO) composes from.

operations.title: [Design] Core navigation / IA screens
operations.description:
## Goal
Lay out the core navigation screens per the IA spec (DS-1) using the component library (DS-4): home dashboard frame, settings home, account.

## Produce (Figma)
Navigation shell screens + transitions.

operations.title: [Spec] Data model + Postgres schema (connections, tokens, entitlements, layouts, settings)
operations.description:
## Goal
Consolidated Postgres schema and data layer: connections, oauth_transactions, entitlements, layouts, widget instances, and user settings/preferences, with RLS, migrations, and derived TS types.

## Must cover
- Tables + columns + RLS policies (consolidates the AOD-9 and AOD-12 table sketches)
- Migration strategy
- Settings/preferences schema (refresh overrides, themes, kiosk schedule)

## Output
docs/specs/data-model.md

operations.title: [Spec] Testing strategy + fixtures
operations.description:
## Goal
Define the test pyramid and fixtures: unit / integration / e2e scope, how OAuth tokens and provider APIs are mocked, and fixture data.

## Output
docs/specs/testing-strategy.md

operations.title: [Decision] Onboarding model: guided vs free-form
operations.description:
## Context
The first-run experience and the biggest activation lever. Decide the model before designing onboarding (gates PS-4 spec and PS-7 design).

## Options
- (A) Guided wizard: pick a widget, connect its service, place it, repeat.
- (B) Free-form: empty dashboard + settings; connect first, compose later.
- (C) Hybrid: guide the first widget to a working state, then free-form.

## Decision
TBD.

## Rationale / Consequences
TBD.

operations.title: [Decision] Library & dependency stack (frontend + backend)
operations.description:
## Context
Backend platform (Supabase, AOD-2) and app framework (Expo + expo-router) are locked. The UI component base is decided separately in AOD-16. This issue decides the rest of the dependency stack, calmly, before Foundation code.

## Categories to decide
**Frontend:** animation (Reanimated / Moti / lib-native), state (Zustand / Jotai / Context), server-state + caching (TanStack Query / SWR / Supabase realtime), forms (React Hook Form / controlled), gestures (gesture-handler for the free-form layout), local storage (MMKV / AsyncStorage; expo-secure-store is locked for secrets), dates (date-fns / dayjs), charts/sparklines for Claude usage (react-native-svg / Victory Native), icons.
**Backend:** DB access / ORM layer (raw supabase-js / Drizzle / Kysely), validation (Zod, shared client+server), Edge Function utilities.
**Shared:** lint/format (ESLint / Biome), test libraries (ties to PS-2).

## Decision
TBD per category.

## Rationale / Consequences
TBD. Gates Foundation code (Platform & App Shell, the component library, integrations).

operations.title: [Spec] Onboarding + connect-service flow
operations.description:
## Goal
Specify the first-run connect-service flow per the chosen model (PS-3): the sequence, OAuth deep-link/callback UX, API-key entry (Weather / Admin), and reconnect prompts on credential death.

## Output
docs/specs/onboarding-flow.md

operations.title: [Design] Dashboard + free-form layout editor
operations.description:
## Goal
Design the free-form dashboard and its editor (AOD-7): place, resize, arrange widget instances; empty state; add-widget entry; the drag/resize affordances.

## Produce (Figma)
Dashboard view + edit mode + add-widget picker, using DS-4 components.

operations.title: [Design] Settings + connections surface
operations.description:
## Goal
Design the settings and connections surface: connected-services list, connect/disconnect, reconnect prompt, API-key entry, account, and the per-instance config forms.

## Produce (Figma)
Settings home, connections list, connect/disconnect + reconnect states.

operations.title: [Design] Onboarding screens
operations.description:
## Goal
Design the onboarding screens per the flow spec (PS-4) and chosen model (PS-3), using DS-4 components.

## Produce (Figma)
First-run sequence screens + empty / success states.

operations.title: [Design] Linear widgets + shared lifecycle chrome (first slice)
operations.description:
## Goal
Design the first-slice widgets (Linear My Issues, Current Cycle) AND the shared widget lifecycle chrome (fresh / stale badge / error dot / needs-config / disconnected + reconnect) that every other widget reuses.

## Produce (Figma)
Linear widget cards at all sizes + the shared lifecycle / error states.

## Note
The first vertical slice (PS-M3). The shared chrome is the base INT-5/6/7 extend.

operations.title: [Spec] Linear integration (My Issues, Current Cycle)
operations.description:
## Goal
Specify the Linear integration: OAuth specifics, the endpoints and query/response shapes for My Issues and Current Cycle, and per-instance config fields (team/project filters).

## Output
docs/specs/integration-linear.md

## Note
Gates the Platform first vertical slice (PS-M3).

operations.title: [Spec] Google Calendar integration (Next Event, Today's Agenda)
operations.description:
## Goal
Specify the Google Calendar integration: OAuth (access_type=offline, prompt=consent), endpoints and shapes for Next Event and Today's Agenda, and config fields (which calendars).

## Output
docs/specs/integration-calendar.md

operations.title: [Spec] Claude usage integration (Spend MTD, Daily Sparkline)
operations.description:
## Goal
Specify the Claude usage integration via the Anthropic Admin API: Spend MTD and Daily Spend Sparkline endpoints and shapes, Admin-key handling (high sensitivity), config fields.

## Output
docs/specs/integration-claude.md

## Note
Standard multi-tenant widgets only. The personal-engine Claude limits widget is AOD-14.

operations.title: [Spec] Clock / Date widget
operations.description:
## Goal
Specify the Clock / Date widget: a no-auth ambient widget, format/timezone config, and how it participates in the registry as authClass=none.

## Output
docs/specs/integration-clock.md

operations.title: [Design] Calendar + Weather widget visuals
operations.description:
## Goal
Design the Calendar (Next Event, Today's Agenda) and Weather (Current + Forecast) widget visuals at all sizes, reusing the shared lifecycle chrome (PS-8).

## Depends
Weather credential handling is AOD-13.

operations.title: [Design] Claude usage widget visuals
operations.description:
## Goal
Design the Claude usage widget visuals: Spend MTD and Daily Spend Sparkline at all sizes, reusing the shared lifecycle chrome (PS-8).

operations.title: [Design] Clock + on-demand refresh affordance
operations.description:
## Goal
Design the Clock / Date ambient widget and the cross-cutting on-demand refresh affordance (AOD-15) as host chrome, plus final lifecycle-state polish.

## Depends
AOD-15 (on-demand refresh affordance).

operations.title: [Design] Paywall, upsell, lock overlays, downgrade dialog
operations.description:
## Goal
Design the monetization surfaces per AOD-12: paywall (monthly/annual, 7-day trial), per-trigger lock overlays and upsell prompts, and the non-destructive downgrade/freeze dialog.

## Produce (Figma)
Paywall, lock overlays, upsell sheets, downgrade picker.

operations.title: [Design] Kiosk wall presentation, day/night, exit affordance
operations.description:
## Goal
Design the kiosk wall-mount presentation per AOD-11: dark, high-contrast layout at a larger type scale, the day/night dim transition, and the exit gesture + PIN affordance.

## Produce (Figma)
Wall layout (fresh / stale / error at scale), dusk/dawn ramp, exit hint + PIN.

operations.title: [Decision] Analytics tool (first-party aggregate)
operations.description:
## Context
AOD-5 commits to no third-party trackers; first-party aggregate analytics only. Pick the tool.

## Options
- (A) PostHog self-hosted
- (B) Supabase-based event logging
- (C) Plausible / privacy-first
- (D) None at launch

## Decision
TBD.

operations.title: [Spec] Observability / logging / audit (PII-safe)
operations.description:
## Goal
Define logging, metrics, and audit: what is logged (never tokens or Admin keys, per AOD-5/AOD-9), PII-safe telemetry, and error/audit trails for support.

## Output
docs/specs/observability.md

operations.title: [Design] Store listing assets (icon, screenshots, marketing)
operations.description:
## Goal
Design the store listing assets once brand is set: app icon, screenshots, and marketing imagery for the App Store and Play.

## Depends
Brand name (AOD-1) and identity (DS-2).
